name: Honey Whole Wheat Bread 2
recipeIngredient: 1 package active dry yeast (1/4 oz, 2-1/4 tsp)
recipeInstructions:
1. Place all ingredients in the bread machine pan in the order suggested by the manufacturer.
2. Select the basic bread setting on the machine.
3. Choose crust color and loaf size as desired.
4. Check the dough after 5 minutes of mixing; add 1 to 2 tablespoons of water or flour if needed.
5. Remove the baked bread from the machine and place it on a cooling rack.
